line_items.note: Zero-rated food/drink. Reclaim risk: food and drink consumed on premises may not qualify as reclaimable input tax.
Blank notebooks are stationery, not books — standard-rated at 20%.

flags.message: VAT number GB 987 654 321 is present and matches the required GB + 9-digit format.
VAT arithmetic verified: standard-rated net £94.99 × 20% = £18.998, rounds to £19.00. Within ±£0.02 rounding tolerance.
Mixed-rate receipt handled correctly: sparkling water correctly zero-rated; all other items correctly standard-rated.
Reclaim risk: 'Sparkling water (office)' is food and drink. Input VAT reclaim may be disallowed if treated as staff refreshments or entertainment. Accountant to confirm business purpose.
